title: Solutions
desc: FluxWallet brings all your finances together — add and track assets, view net worth, and plan with clarity. With built-in intelligence woven across the platform, manage and grow your wealth through seamless guidance and effortless actions.

solutions.description: View your entire financial picture in one place. Track assets, liabilities, and net worth effortlessly, giving you clarity and confidence to plan ahead.
AI powered intelligence layer integrated deeply into the platform that can understand your wealth, manage assets, debts, and goals through natural language and automated execution.
Stay in charge of your portfolio. Add, edit, or remove entries anytime, ensuring your financial records remain accurate, flexible, and always upto date.
